description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this lovely piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSilver band with crown shaped centre embellishmentGold centre stone flanked by white smaller stones in the centre embellishmentMaterial and CareSilver, CZ insetWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
